assertions.title: Plugin failure isolation during registry reload

steps.action: Import healthy plugin (/tmp/utv_ext_g2_iso_good_plugin) and failing plugin (/tmp/utv_ext_g2_iso_bad_plugin)
steps.expected: Reload continues and does not crash when one plugin fails
steps.observed: Both plugins listed as enabled after import; command API remained healthy

steps.expected: Healthy plugin definitions still available while failing plugin definitions are skipped

steps.expected: Test verifies failure is logged/skipped and healthy plugin remains registered

summary: Validated 4 assertions for external-plugin-dx lifecycle/runtime group g2: VAL-EXT-005/006/010/011 all passed using namespaced utv_ext_g2 fixtures. Evidence includes deterministic API responses for enable/disable/uninstall and reload isolation, direct runtime error message capture with plugin+method+stderr/output context, and targeted pytest confirmations (6 focused tests, all passing). Environment cleanup completed: all utv_ext_g2 test plugins uninstalled and no utv_ext_g2 plugin directories remain.
